description: Basic combat rules for the 1.0 warlord duel prototype

play_types.name: Triplet
play_types.description: 3 identical tiles; enters open meld ledger

play_types.name: Sequence
play_types.description: 3 consecutive suited tiles; enters open meld ledger

play_types.name: Pair + Single
play_types.description: A pair triggers weak effect and the single tile triggers base effect

play_types.name: Pair
play_types.description: 2 identical tiles; triggers weak effect and draws 2 next turn

play_types.name: Single
play_types.description: 1 tile; triggers base effect and draws 1 next turn

play_types.name: Scattered
play_types.description: Only one selected tile triggers base effect

win_condition_description: 4 melds + 1 pair; melds may come from open melds and concealed candidates, pair must come from current hand

score_system.description: Pattern levels, base values, and multipliers

flower_season_buffs.description: Flower and season tile combat buffs

warlord_skills.description: Three player warlords and equipment-driven build synergies

shop.description: Spend money on warlords, weapons, upgrades, consumables, and deck edits

roguelike_map.description: Map nodes, enemy warlord stages, modifiers, and bosses
